title: Proof of Concept: Validating Seeded Randomization and Content Families in Shipping API Dojo v2
summary: Issue #8 implemented a proof of concept for minimum viable randomization and content families. I validated MCQ shuffling, lesson drill ordering, scenario sequencing, and SSR-safe behavior under TanStack Start.
body: # Proof of Concept: Validating Seeded Randomization and Content Families in Shipping API Dojo v2
heroImageAlt: A validation dashboard showing deterministic seed behavior, shuffle helpers test results, and the content-family compatibility adapter pattern
author: Nicolas Brulay
